subject: A scarred volcanic landscape with a glowing eruption in the distance, smoke and ash drifting across a ruined plain at dusk; a stone monument or marker stands at the edge of the wasteland
description: A wide, desolate panorama dominated by an erupting volcano on the horizon, its caldera glowing molten orange-red against a heavy red-brown sky thick with smoke and ash. The middle ground is a cracked, blackened plain veined with cooling lava channels and scattered embers. At the right edge of the foreground stands a weathered stone monument or stele, silhouetted against the firelight. The entire scene is rendered in a near-monochrome palette of crimson, ochre, and charcoal, evoking aftermath rather than active battle.
foreground: cracked scorched earth with cooling lava veins and a stone monument at right
background: erupting volcano spewing fire and smoke under a red-brown ash-clouded sky
